title: Agents
subtitleMulti: Manage and collaborate with multiple AI agents
deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete agent "{{name}}"? The agent configuration will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
noAgentsDesc: Create a new agent to enable multi-agent collaboration.

form.title: Create New Agent
form.idHint: Unique identifier. Letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.
form.name: Display Name
form.modelHint: Leave empty to use the default model. Use model aliases, not date-suffixed IDs.
form.roleLeadDesc: Dispatch hub, assigns tasks to sub-agents
form.roleSubDesc: Focused on specific tasks, directed by a lead
form.roleHint: Leave unset for a standalone agent not in the hierarchy.
form.parentHint: This agent will become a subordinate of the selected parent.
form.requireMentionDesc: Only respond when @mentioned in channels (recommended for sub-agents)
form.crossCommDesc: Allow sub-agents to communicate with each other
form.errorIdInvalid: Agent ID must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores
form.errorIdReserved: "main" is reserved and cannot be used as an agent ID

wizard.basicDesc: Set the basic identity for your agent. The ID is used as a unique identifier.
wizard.hierarchyDesc: Set this agent's role and position in the organizational hierarchy.
wizard.modelDesc: Choose the AI model for this agent. Different models suit different tasks.
wizard.modelAliasHint: Use model aliases (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-5), not date-suffixed versions.
wizard.soulDesc: Define this agent's role, personality, and working rules in SOUL.md — the soul of the agent.
wizard.soulHint: SOUL.md is the core file that differentiates agents. It defines who the agent is and how it should behave.

settings.title: {{name}} Settings
settings.desc: Update the Agent name and manage which Channels belong to this Agent.
settings.modelHint: Leave empty to inherit the global default model.
settings.toolProfileHint: Predefined permission sets for the agent.
settings.toolAllowHint: Additional tool names to allow (one per line).
settings.toolAllowPlaceholder:
e.g. Bash(npm run lint)
Read
Write
settings.toolDenyHint: Tool names to deny even if the profile allows them (one per line).
settings.skillsHint: Manage which skills this agent can use. Disabling a skill here only affects this agent.
settings.skillsAllEnabled: All skills are enabled. Disabling any skill will create a per-agent allowlist.
settings.skillsCustomAllowlist: This agent uses a custom skill allowlist ({{count}} skills allowed).
settings.noSkillsDesc: Install skills from the Skills page to extend agent capabilities.
settings.channelsNote: Each Channel type keeps only one configuration in ClawX. Saving a configured Channel here will switch its binding to the current Agent.
settings.noChannelsDesc: Click "Add Channel" to bind an available channel.
settings.noAvailableChannelsDesc: Please configure channels on the Channels page first.

import.title: Import Agent Template
import.desc: Choose a predefined agent template to create an agent with one click.
import.detailDesc: Review the template configuration and customise before importing.
import.missingSkillsHint: Please install the missing skills from the Skills page before importing this agent.
import.missingSkillsError: Cannot import: required skills are not installed.
import.profileDescDefault: Balanced default permissions with common tools access.
import.profileDescFull: Unrestricted access to all available tools including shell, file system, and web.
import.profileDescCoding: Shell, file system, and code execution access for development tasks.
import.profileDescMinimal: Read-only access with minimal tool usage.
import.profileDescNone: No tool access. The agent can only use its built-in language abilities.
import.idTaken: Agent ID "{{id}}" is already in use. Please choose a different ID.

soul.editDesc: SOUL.md defines the agent's role, personality, and working principles. Changes take effect on the next conversation.
